reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio YPF del Automóvil Club Argentino. Importante sede con todos los diferentes tipos de combustibles, salón de ventas Full con mini Mercado, amplio estacionamiento y dispone de servicios rápidos al automotor tal como cambio de aceite, accesorios, etc.

(Translated by Google)
YPF service station of the Argentine Automobile Club. This important location offers all types of fuel, a full sales area with a mini-market, ample parking, and quick vehicle services such as oil changes, accessories, and more.

reviews.comment:
Me dejaron esperando... Para atenderme... Cuando todos los empleados... Estaban  juntos matándose de risa... Y cuando se signaron a atenderme... Ni siquiera fueron capaz de preguntarme... Si quería limpiar los vidrios... Y lo precisaba... De onda pero en la axion lo hacen cada vez que voy... El servicio... Deja mucho que desear... Pareciera que ellos te están haciendo un favor. Patético.

(Translated by Google)
They left me waiting... to serve me... When all the employees... were together laughing their heads off... And when they finally decided to help me... They weren't even able to ask me... If I wanted the windows cleaned... And I needed it... I mean, come on, but at Axion they do this every time I go... The service... Leaves a lot to be desired... It's like they're doing you a favor. Pathetic.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURDbzREd1hREAE
